title: Prescription Drug Discount Cards - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Prescription Drug Discount Cards 7 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG PHARMACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This is an in-house pharmacy that participates in the 340B Drug Pricing Program and may help with discounted prescription costs. Prescriptions are often ready for pick-up shortly after the provider visit, and most refill requests are available on the same day they are made. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Aviva Health patients who are insured or uninsured Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 492-2078 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEEDYMEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website and helpline offering information on programs that help people who cannot afford medications and health care costs, including pharmaceutical patient assistance programs, diagnosis-based assistance programs, free/low-cost/sliding scale clinics, drug discount coupons, camps and scholarships offered for a specific diagnosis, and state programs. Also offers information on lower-cost MRIs and CAT scans and an advocate program for people who are struggling with medical bills. NeedyMeds also runs a drug discount card program that can save people up to 80% on prescription drugs, over-the-counter medications, and medical supplies when written on a prescription blank, and pet prescription drugs purchased at a pharmacy. Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Helpline: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (800) 503-6897 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON PRESCRIPTION DRUG PROGRAM ARRAYRX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps Oregonians purchase prescription drugs at up to an 80% discount on generic drugs, and up to 20% off brand-name drugs. Website maintains list of participating pharmacies and current drug prices. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (800) 913-4284 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON RX CARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prescription assistance program that provides savings of up to 80% on generic and brand medications. The program is accepted at Safeway, BI-MART, CVS, Fred Meyer, Rite Aid, Walgreens, and Walmart. Website Eligibility: Uninsured and underinsured individuals. Those with insurance, including Medicare Part D, can also utilize the program for medications not covered by their plans. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Visit Website More Details OUTCARE HEALTH LGBTQ2+ PRESCRIPTION SAVINGS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prescription drug discount cards. Individuals may also get assistance with medications for their pets. Website Los Angeles, CA 90018 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as LGBTQ2+ Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details PATIENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM CENTER RXASSIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers information about medication assistance programs, which are set up by pharmaceutical companies to provide free or discounted prescriptions to uninsured individuals who cannot afford their medications. These programs mainly cover brand-name prescriptions. Some assistance programs also extend help to insured individuals who meet specific hardship criteria or whose medications are not covered by their insurance. Additionally, the website provides a printable prescription discount card for users. Website Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details SINGLECARE PRESCRIPTION SAVINGS CARDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides discount cards for immediate savings on most Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved prescription medications. Offers a "Drug Price Lookup Tool" which provides real-time prices and compares prices across pharmacies. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (844) 234-3057 Visit Website More Details AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG PHARMACY OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON PRESCRIPTION DRUG PROGRAM ARRAYRX
